name: Charter Hall Retail Reit
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$3.8673. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$3.8673, stop A$3.5244, target A$3.8945. Risk/reward is 0.08:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
